title: Atlas, can you bring me a drink? | Boston Dynamics
title_zh: Atlas，能给我拿杯饮料吗？| Boston Dynamics
abstract:
Everyone asks if Atlas can bring them a drink, but this robot can bring you the whole fridge. Using AI-driven behaviors, Atlas is doing hard work and coordinating its whole body to manage heavy objects, balancing complex contact points with accuracy and reliability.
Go behind the scenes of this groundbreaking research: https://youtu.be/xKK5ze3FukQ
Learn how we train Atlas with reinforcement learning: https://bostondynamics.com/blog/training-a-humanoid-robot-for-hard-work/
abstract_zh: 每个人都在问Atlas能否拿杯饮料，但这个机器人能给你搬来整个冰箱。通过AI驱动的行为，Atlas正在从事繁重工作，协调全身来搬运重物，以精确和可靠的方式平衡复杂的接触点。走进这项突破性研究的幕后：https://youtu.be/xKK5ze3FukQ 了解我们如何用强化学习训练Atlas：https://bostondynamics.com/blog/training-a-humanoid-robot-for-hard-work/
tldr_zh: Atlas机器人用AI协调全身搬运重物，实现精确平衡。
cover_zh: 别问Atlas能不能拿饮料｜它直接给你搬来整个冰箱
